report.summary: Cycle 11 standup: 3 agent runs since v10 (build-v5 + eod-v8 + this standup). 2 new learn guides shipped (Liquid Staking Tokens 954 lines + Crypto Prediction Markets 806 lines), 16 total learn pages now on disk (~10,706+ lines). QA confirmed 41 uncommitted files, 141 TS errors stable, no regressions. P0 blocker persists: 42 uncommitted files need commit+push — 11th consecutive standup flagging this.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA FROM V10: 3 agent runs completed — build-v5 (2 new learn guides: Liquid Staking Tokens ~954 lines covering $66.86B TVL ecosystem + Crypto Prediction Markets ~806 lines covering $18B+ monthly volume), eod-v8 (QA confirming 41 uncommitted files, 1,240 pages on disk, 628 published slugs, 141 TS errors stable, 6/6 API routes intact).

CONTENT PIPELINE: 16 learn guides now on disk (~10,706+ lines, up from 14 / 8,946+ at v10). Latest 2: Liquid Staking Tokens Guide 2026 (Lido $19-38B TVL, Rocket Pool $1.19B, stETH vs rETH mechanics, DeFi composability strategies, yield stacking) + Crypto Prediction Markets Guide 2026 (Polymarket vs Kalshi, $18B+ monthly volume, CFTC no-action letter, trading strategies, 2026 regulatory landscape).
SOCIAL PIPELINE: Unchanged since v10 — 284 tweets drafted all-time. Apr 20-26 scheduled. Newsletter v9 drafted. 6+ social cards created today.
PUBLISH STATUS: 628 published slugs (unchanged). PUBLISH_QUEUE empty. 16 learn pages on disk awaiting deploy. 42 uncommitted files in git (13 modified, 29 untracked).
BUILD HEALTH: 141 TS errors (stable, non-blocking). Latest commit 3b2dd28 unchanged all day — production running Mar 24 deployment.

MARKET DATA (last known, egress blocked): BTC ~$68,224-$68,688, ETH ~$2,104-$2,135, F&G 8 (Extreme Fear, 60+ day streak). LST TVL $66.86B. Prediction market volume $18B+/mo. Tax deadline Apr 15 (14 days).
SEO NOTE: No GSC or Vercel Analytics available from sandbox. Crypto Tax Guide + LST Guide + Prediction Markets Guide all high-urgency timely content blocked on deploy.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE STATUS: 11th standup of Apr 1. ~43 total agent cycles today: standup ×11, build ×5, publish ×4, design ×7, community ×7, eod ×8 (carried forward from v10 + delta).

V10 PRIORITIES STATUS: (1) Commit & Deploy — NO CHANGE (P0 blocker persists across all 11 standups, now 42 uncommitted files). (2) Batch-scaffold 109 missing page.tsx — NOT STARTED (carried over all day). (3) Capitalize on timely content windows — IN PROGRESS (16 learn guides + 284 tweets + OG images + social cards all ready, blocked on deploy).
COMPLETED SINCE V10: Build-v5 created 2 guides (LST 954 + Prediction Markets 806 = 1,760 lines). EOD-v8 ran QA confirming 1,240 pages, 628 published slugs, 6/6 API routes, no regressions.

P0 BLOCKER (PERSISTENT ALL DAY — 11TH CYCLE): 42 uncommitted files (13 modified + 29 untracked) need commit+push. All 16 learn guides, OG images, social cards, UX fixes, yield tracker refactor — everything is ready but nothing deploys. Production still running Mar 24 deployment.
P1 CARRY-OVER (UNCHANGED): 109 published slugs missing page.tsx (18% indexing gap). Carried over across all 11 standups without action.
P2: defi-yields fallback gap. 141 TS errors (stable). Stablecoin yield tracker search not debounced. ~55 older learn pages with potentially missing OG images.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT & DEPLOY (P0, CRITICAL, 11TH CONSECUTIVE CYCLE): 16 learn guides (~10,706+ lines), 14+ OG images, 284 tweets, UX fixes, yield tracker refactor — all sitting in working tree (42 uncommitted files). Tax deadline 14 days away, LST ecosystem at $66.86B TVL, prediction markets at $18B+/mo — all timely content MUST be indexed to capture peak searches. This is a ~3-minute action (commit+push) that unlocks the entire day's ~$3,100+ of agent output. ESCALATION: Requires human intervention — agents cannot push.
PRIORITY 2 — BATCH-SCAFFOLD 109 MISSING PAGE.TSX: 18% indexing gap. Carried over all 11 cycles. Recommend: next build cycle after deploy does ONLY scaffolding — no new content until gap is closed.

PRIORITY 3 — CONTENT CALENDAR EXTENSION (APR 27-MAY 3): Social calendar covers Apr 7-26. Gap starts Apr 27. Next community cycle should draft Apr 27-May 3 content. Topics: post-Pectra developer adoption, Layer 2 fee comparison refresh, LST yield strategies, prediction market regulatory updates.
